Where is my solo bonfire?

Solo Stove: I'm happy to help! Let me look into that for you! When did you place your order? You might still be within our production time frame.

Our processing time takes 2 business days and we usually ship via UPS or FedEx. Once shipped it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders. 

You'll receive tracking info via email as soon as it ships. Could you check your spam and promo folders as sometimes our emails end up there?
Sunday, 17th November.  Order DOES NOT show that the Bonfire has been shipped yet

Solo Stove: I'm sorry for any inconvenience this has caused. I totally understand how important it is to keep track of your order. Could you please provide me with your order number and email address? I'll look into this with my team and get back to you as soon as I have more information.

Order #: 4065477Mderuyter@hotmail.com What's concerning is that the order information says the bonfire was delivered.   Today all I got was the accessories.  No good without the bonfire and if it's missing, need solo to make this right asap.  Otherwise I'll cancel/return order and buy a competitor that can deliver
Solo Stove: Thank you for the details. I've gone ahead and passed this on to my team. I'll be in touch once I get an update.\\\

send_to_cs: Send to CS for repair/customization requests
escalate: If a cx had issues after a sale is over, ESC to see if they can honor the deal
ESC immediately, if the customer asks when an order will ship
If a cx has a request for urgent delivery ESC and they'll prioritize it
ESC if a cx is having trouble placing an order
If a cx asks for an update regarding an email they sent, ask for their email address, then ESC
ESC immediately if a cx is very upset
ESC if cx's have issues applying both loyalty codes
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over
templates: ➜ Ask which item the customer has
➜ If it's an Ellington item from before 2016, use ECR shortcut
dos_and_donts: For stock questions, check the product page to look for possible back-in-stock dates
If cx calls after hours, advise them to leave a voicemail and the team will be sure to call back
drive_to_purchase: When recommending a pre-order item - set proper expectations and mention the date it'll be back in stock
promo_and_exclusions: They have a loyalty program where cx's can use code MMLEGACY20 & FAITHFULSHIPPING at the same time to receive 20% off plus free shipping. The MMLEGACY20 code only applies to cxs who have spent $2000+
➜ These are the only 2 codes that can be stacked, and they can only be stacked with each other and no other code
Welcome code works on discounted/sale items
DO NOT share the WELCOME15 code with cx's, it's no longer valid

conversation.message_text: Mission Mercantile: Welcome to Mission Mercantile! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Mission Mercantile: Hey, this is Sarah, your personal concierge! Feel free to text me if you ever have any questions!

Your 15% off coupon is WELCOME15. Click here to auto-apply it when you shop: https://missionmercantile.attn.tv/anqT7q-4JF50 
 Stop to stop
This isn't taking off the additional 15%
Mission Mercantile: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you please send me a screenshot of what you see on your end, including the item/s on your cart? I'll be more than happy to look into this for you!
When I put in the additional code it just replaces the current code and applies the WELCOME15 15% and the price is the same

Mission Mercantile: Thank you! I just checked and it seems like what you're looking to purchase already has a discount pre-applied which is why the code isn't working as the system typically can't stack more than one promo at checkout. Feel free to use the one that has better value for you.
They are equivalent discounts. But the add said it would stack. So now I'm wondering how the company is able to false advertise like that
Mission Mercantile: I'm sorry to hear that! Let me check with the team, and I'll get back to you once I have more information.
Ok
Mission Mercantile: I'll keep you posted!
Thank you

Mission Mercantile: Thanks for your patience! I just heard from the team, who offered their sincerest apologies. Unfortunately, the Welcome Discount (WELCOME15) and GovX may individually stack on top of a sitewide sale, however they cannot both be stacked on top of each other. If you have any further questions, please let me know.
So how come the website told me it can stack the WELCOME15 discount (the whole reason for texting and enrolling in this number) with the First15 offer I had from signing up with my email?
Template used: "Feedback 1 - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 18:03:27.339

Mission Mercantile: I'm really sorry for the confusion! Can you please share a screenshot of the add you're referring to? Feedback from our customers is really valuable for us and helps us constantly improve! Let me know, I'm here to help!

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS
